calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of short cause trial/prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:29:07 a.m. and concluding at 01:50:52 p.m. and concluding at 02:03:35 p.m.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. represented by Brian Langedyk, Esq.
Defendant Lawrence H. Lam not appearing.

Plaintiff submits on admissions and Declaraion file pursuant to Civil Code Procedure 98
Plaintiff presents summary of facts and an offer of proof.

Court takes judicial notice of the Order Deeming Request for Admission Adnitted filed Aug-15-2022. It is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.
Declaration filed Aug-19-2022 is hereby ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against Defendant Lawrence H. Lam.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., a Delaware Corporation is awarded judgment against Defendant Lawrence H. Lam as follows:

Damages/Principal: $20,643.95
Costs: $497.00

Total Judgment: $21,140.95

Proposed Judgment was submitted, signed by the Court, and served in open court.
Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted, no opposition filed. The Request for Admissions (Set One) propounded by plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., on defendant Lawrence H. Lam are deemed admitted.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion For Order Deeming Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
